privileged_info_summary: The task is a generative synthetic exercise operating on a mocked Chrome profile populated with artificial history, cookies, and bookmarks via setup scripts. It has been verified that the expected bookmark folders ('IRS Resources', 'State Tax Authorities', 'Professional & Standards', 'Tax Software & Tools'), search keywords ('irs', 'pub', 'ssa'), download directory ('/home/ga/Documents/Client_Tax_Files'), and homepage ('irs.gov') all explicitly match the task description instructions and verifier logic constraints.
